description.zh: 第五届强网杯CTF比赛的详细解题记录，涵盖Web、Crypto、Misc等多个方向。
description.en: Detailed writeup of the 5th Qiangwangbei CTF competition, covering Web, Crypto, Misc and other categories.

content.zh: 分析2024第五届强网杯的题目

annotation.zh: 用户请求分析强网杯题目
annotation.en: User requests analysis of Qiangwangbei challenges

content.zh: 第五届强网杯涵盖多个方向。首先查看Web方向的题目类型和难度。
content.en: The 5th Qiangwangbei covers multiple categories. First checking Web challenge types and difficulty.

content.zh: Web题目涉及SQL注入、文件上传、反序列化等常见漏洞类型
content.en: Web challenges involve SQL injection, file upload, deserialization and other common vulnerability types

content.zh: Web题目类型多样。按照常规流程逐个分析，优先处理有明确突破口的题目。
content.en: Web challenges are diverse. Analyzing each following standard procedures, prioritizing those with clear entry points.

content.zh: SQL注入题目成功获取数据库敏感信息
content.en: SQL injection challenge successfully retrieved sensitive database information

content.zh: 文件上传题目绕过前端验证和后端过滤
content.en: File upload challenge bypassed frontend validation and backend filtering

content.zh: 多个Web题目成功解决。继续分析Crypto和Misc方向的题目，综合运用各类技能。
content.en: Multiple web challenges solved. Continuing to analyze Crypto and Misc challenges, applying various skills.

annotation.zh: 完成Web题目转向其他方向
annotation.en: Completed web challenges, turning to other categories
